mapper.select:
SELECT PRODUCT_ID AS productId, PLATFORM AS platform, PRODUCT_NAME AS productName, BRAND AS brand, CATEGORY AS category, PRICE AS price, AVG_RATING AS avgRating, TOTAL_REVIEW_COUNT AS totalReviewCount, OVERALL_POS_RATE AS overallPosRate, OVERALL_NEG_RATE AS overallNegRate, BASE_SKIN_TYPE AS baseSkinType, SKIN_REVIEW_COUNT AS skinReviewCount, SKIN_POS_RATE AS skinPosRate, SKIN_NEG_RATE AS skinNegRate, TOP_NEED_TAGS AS topNeedTags, TOP_CONCERN_TAGS AS topConcernTags, CAUTION_LEVEL AS cautionLevel, RECOMMENDATION_SCORE AS recommendationScore, RECOMMENDATION_TIER AS recommendationTier, EVIDENCE_LEVEL AS evidenceLevel, PRODUCT_URL AS productUrl, IMAGE_URL AS imageUrl, IMAGE_STATUS AS imageStatus, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BL_PRODUCT_FAVORITES fav WHERE fav.PRODUCT_ID = BL_PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_ID) AS favoriteCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BL_PRODUCT_RATINGS rt WHERE rt.PRODUCT_ID = BL_PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_ID) AS siteRatingCount, (SELECT ROUND(AVG(rt.RATING), 2) FROM BL_PRODUCT_RATINGS rt WHERE rt.PRODUCT_ID = BL_PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_ID) AS siteRatingAvg, (SELECT ROUND(AVG(rt.RATING), 2) FROM BL_PRODUCT_RATINGS rt WHERE rt.PRODUCT_ID = BL_PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_ID AND rt.SKIN_TYPE_AT_TIME = #{skinType}) AS sameSkinRatingAvg, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BL_USER_PRODUCT_EVENTS ev WHERE ev.PRODUCT_ID = BL_PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_ID AND ev.EVENT_TYPE IN ('VIEW', 'DETAIL_VIEW')) AS viewCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BL_PRODUCT_COMMENTS c WHERE c.PRODUCT_ID = BL_PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_ID AND c.STATUS = 'ACTIVE') AS commentCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BL_RECOMMENDATION_FEEDBACK fb WHERE fb.PRODUCT_ID = BL_PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_ID AND fb.FEEDBACK_TYPE = 'LIKE') AS feedbackLikeCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BL_RECOMMENDATION_FEEDBACK fb WHERE fb.PRODUCT_ID = BL_PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_ID AND fb.FEEDBACK_TYPE = 'DISLIKE') AS feedbackDislikeCount FROM BL_PRODUCTS WHERE BASE_SKIN_TYPE = #{skinType} AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM BL_PRODUCT_ADMIN_FLAGS af WHERE af.PRODUCT_ID = BL_PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_ID AND (af.IS_VISIBLE = 'N' OR af.EXCLUDE_RECOMMENDATION = 'Y') )
AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM BL_RECOMMENDATION_FEEDBACK nf WHERE nf.PRODUCT_ID = BL_PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_ID AND nf.MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} AND nf.FEEDBACK_TYPE = 'NOT_INTERESTED' )
ORDER BY RECOMMENDATION_SCORE DESC NULLS LAST FETCH FIRST #{size} ROWS ONLY

SELECT PRODUCT_ID AS productId, PLATFORM AS platform, PRODUCT_NAME AS productName, BRAND AS brand, CATEGORY AS category, PRICE AS price, AVG_RATING AS avgRating, TOTAL_REVIEW_COUNT AS totalReviewCount, OVERALL_POS_RATE AS overallPosRate, OVERALL_NEG_RATE AS overallNegRate, BASE_SKIN_TYPE AS baseSkinType, SKIN_REVIEW_COUNT AS skinReviewCount, SKIN_POS_RATE AS skinPosRate, SKIN_NEG_RATE AS skinNegRate, TOP_NEED_TAGS AS topNeedTags, TOP_CONCERN_TAGS AS topConcernTags, CAUTION_LEVEL AS cautionLevel, RECOMMENDATION_SCORE AS recommendationScore, RECOMMENDATION_TIER AS recommendationTier, EVIDENCE_LEVEL AS evidenceLevel, PRODUCT_URL AS productUrl, IMAGE_URL AS imageUrl, IMAGE_STATUS AS imageStatus, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BL_PRODUCT_FAVORITES fav WHERE fav.PRODUCT_ID = BL_PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_ID) AS favoriteCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BL_PRODUCT_RATINGS rt WHERE rt.PRODUCT_ID = BL_PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_ID) AS siteRatingCount, (SELECT ROUND(AVG(rt.RATING), 2) FROM BL_PRODUCT_RATINGS rt WHERE rt.PRODUCT_ID = BL_PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_ID) AS siteRatingAvg, (SELECT ROUND(AVG(rt.RATING), 2) FROM BL_PRODUCT_RATINGS rt WHERE rt.PRODUCT_ID = BL_PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_ID AND rt.SKIN_TYPE_AT_TIME = #{skinType}) AS sameSkinRatingAvg, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BL_USER_PRODUCT_EVENTS ev WHERE ev.PRODUCT_ID = BL_PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_ID AND ev.EVENT_TYPE IN ('VIEW', 'DETAIL_VIEW')) AS viewCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BL_PRODUCT_COMMENTS c WHERE c.PRODUCT_ID = BL_PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_ID AND c.STATUS = 'ACTIVE') AS commentCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BL_RECOMMENDATION_FEEDBACK fb WHERE fb.PRODUCT_ID = BL_PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_ID AND fb.FEEDBACK_TYPE = 'LIKE') AS feedbackLikeCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BL_RECOMMENDATION_FEEDBACK fb WHERE fb.PRODUCT_ID = BL_PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_ID AND fb.FEEDBACK_TYPE = 'DISLIKE') AS feedbackDislikeCount FROM BL_PRODUCTS WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM BL_PRODUCT_ADMIN_FLAGS af WHERE af.PRODUCT_ID = BL_PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_ID AND (af.IS_VISIBLE = 'N' OR af.EXCLUDE_RECOMMENDATION = 'Y') )
AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM BL_RECOMMENDATION_FEEDBACK nf WHERE nf.PRODUCT_ID = BL_PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_ID AND nf.MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} AND nf.FEEDBACK_TYPE = 'NOT_INTERESTED' )
ORDER BY RECOMMENDATION_SCORE DESC NULLS LAST FETCH FIRST #{size} ROWS ONLY
